title: Leo's Pizzeria
blurb: Build, identify, equivalent, compare, and combine fractions

help.howToPlay: Build fractions on pizza, identify from a picture, complete to a whole, compare, or match equivalents — by task. Tap "Serve Pizza" when ready.
help.scoring: Correct answer +30, streak bonuses. After 3 failed attempts the solution is shown.
help.rewards: Coins are awarded based on how many customers you served, accuracy, streaks, and difficulty level - even if you didn't serve all 20 customers.
help.tip: Pay attention to numerator and denominator — pizza slices are always equal parts.
